case_title: MEI FANG WANG et al VS. ADAM KING et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-03-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-19-2012 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, MEI FANG ZHAO, DE XIONG WANG, STEVEN SHANPING ZHU, CHENWEN AS TO DEFENDANT KING, ADAM DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-03-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-31-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-19-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
